parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.telegram_chat_id,
  i.id            AS idea_id,
  i.title         AS idea_title,
  i.description   AS idea_description,
  i.project_id,
  pr.title        AS project_title,
  c.paper_id,
  c.paper_title,
  c.paper_abstract,
  c.paper_url,
  c.arxiv_id,
  c.cosine_similarity
FROM ideas i
JOIN projects pr ON pr.id = i.project_id
JOIN users u ON u.id = i.user_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    p.id                                AS paper_id,
    p.title                             AS paper_title,
    p.abstract                          AS paper_abstract,
    p.url                               AS paper_url,
    p.arxiv_id,
    1 - (pe.embedding <=> i.embedding)  AS cosine_similarity
  FROM paper_embeddings pe
  JOIN papers p ON p.id = pe.paper_id
  WHERE p.created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    AND p.ingested_via = 'scheduled'
  ORDER BY pe.embedding <=> i.embedding
  LIMIT 5
) c
WHERE i.user_id = '{{ $('Set').item.json.user_id }}'::UUID
  AND i.status  = 'active'
  AND pr.status = 'active'
ORDER BY i.id, c.cosine_similarity DESC;

INSERT INTO idea_paper_matches (idea_id, paper_id, cosine_similarity, llm_relevance_score, llm_reasoning, delivered_in_digest, delivered_at, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.idea_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.paper_id }}'::UUID,
  {{ $json.cosine_similarity }},
  {{ $json.relevance_score }},
  $${{ $json.reasoning }}$$,
  TRUE,
  now(),
  'daily_digest'
)
ON CONFLICT (idea_id, paper_id) DO UPDATE SET
  delivered_in_digest = TRUE,
  delivered_at = now();
